3c832afabea366f7af3dd49c6079e0f8.response: The speed of light is approximately 299,792 kilometers per second (km/s), which can also be expressed as about \(3 \times 10^8\) meters per second (\(m/s\)). This constant value applies across all inertial reference frames in a vacuum and has been verified through numerous experiments.
